name: Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice rhubarb into pieces about 1/3 inch thick.
2. Combine the sliced rhubarb and strawberries in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, ground cloves, ground nutmeg, and cinnamon.
4. Stir the spice mixture into the fruit.
5. Let the mixture stand for approximately 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Pour the filling into an unbaked pie crust.
7. Top with butter.
8. Make a lattice top crust and place it on the lowest shelf of the oven.
9. Bake at 375°F for 35-40 minutes.
